positive: A whimsical, stylized illustration of a gentle sloth hanging from an overgrown tropical vine, surrounded by bioluminescent jungle flora. The sloth is depicted with a calm, slightly humorous expression, framed by stylized monstera leaves, blooming orchids, and vibrant, exotic foliage. The scene should feature a clean, strong silhouette style with thick outlines, utilizing limited, rich colors (deep teal, emerald green, burnt orange, and soft lavender) to create high contrast against a clean, off-white background. The composition must be centered and highly graphic, suitable for an apparel print, featuring distinct, clean color blocking and satisfying visual symmetry. Vector art style, deep saturation, mid-century modern botanical illustration feel, perfect for screen printing.
negative: blur, artifacts, noise, text, watermark, logo, signature, poor anatomy, extra limbs, low detail, realistic photography, grayscale, muddy colors, grainy, bad composition, messy lines
